title: Principal AI Research Engineer
description: Lead our new Neural Architect team. Requires deep expertise in LLM fine-tuning, vector databases (Qdrant/Pinecone), and distributed training. We are building the next generation of job-seeking AI.

title: Full Stack Glassmorphism Expert
description: We need someone who can push Tailwind and Framer Motion to their limits. Must have a portfolio of translucent, high-depth interfaces. React and Next.js 15+ experience is mandatory.

title: Legacy System Maintainer (FORTRAN/COBOL)
description: Support our core banking systems from the 1970s. Must be comfortable reading documentation written on literal scrolls. 20+ years of experience with mainframes preferred.

title: Manual Spreadsheet Specialist
description: Copy and paste data between 400 different Excel workbooks accurately. Formulas are forbidden; we prefer manual entry to minimize 'rounding errors'. Attention to every single cell is critical.

title: Underwater Basket Weaver (Senior)
description: Must be able to hold breath for 5 minutes while crafting premium wicker products. SCUBA certification is a plus, but we prefer 'natural' divers for authenticity.

title: Professional Napper (R&D)
description: Test our new line of futuristic pillows. Must be capable of falling asleep on command in front of a live audience. Snoring is considered a performance bonus.

title: LinkedIn Deep-Fried Meme Consultant
description: Optimize the JPEG artifacts on our Corporate Humour posts. Must understand the delicate balance of making a meme 'just crusty enough' to be relatable to middle management.

title: Staff Engineer (Poison Pill)
description: Amazing role building distributed systems. **NOTE: We do NOT use React, Node, or TypeScript. We write everything in our proprietary language called 'Grumble'. You must move to our mountain retreat for 6 months for training.**

title: Director of Product Overhaul
description: We need a visionary to lead our comprehensive UI/UX overhaul. You will have full ownership over the design system and front-end stack. Experience with Next.js and Tailwind is a major advantage.
